title: Endless Backrooms: Extensions
description: Just an addon for a backrooms mod
body:
Endless Backrooms: Extensions is an addon for the [Endless Backrooms](https://modrinth.com/mod/endless-backrooms) mod, which is compatible with the [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) and [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) mods; more integrations will be added in the future.



This mod was designed to be updated after every Endless Backrooms update, but from time to time I’ll release updates before Endless Backrooms itself is updated.



This is a test version to demonstrate future mechanics that won’t be able to be implemented within the main mod.
